seoTitle: How to Bulk Edit Shopify Prices by Percentage in 2026
metaDescription: Need to raise or lower prices across your whole Shopify store? Here's how to bulk edit by percentage using the admin panel or a pricing app in 2026.
intro: Editing product prices one at a time in Shopify doesn't scale once you're running a sale, adjusting for supplier costs, or updating margins across a full catalog. This guide covers bulk editing prices directly in the Shopify admin panel and using third-party apps like Bulk Price Editor, Easy by Bulk Editing, or Hextom to apply percentage-based changes automatically. It also covers testing changes safely before they go live and scheduling price updates ahead of a sale.

steps.heading: Use Shopify's built-in bulk editor
steps.body: Open the bulk editor from your Shopify admin panel to select multiple products and adjust prices without editing each one individually.

steps.heading: Install a bulk price editor app for percentage changes
steps.body: For percentage-based increases or decreases across your whole catalog, use an app like Bulk Price Editor, Easy by Bulk Editing, or Hextom.

steps.heading: Apply a percentage increase or decrease
steps.body: Set your desired percentage — for example, increasing all prices by 10% or decreasing them by 20% — and apply it across the selected products.

steps.heading: Test the changes before publishing
steps.body: Preview or test the price updates before they go live on your store, so you can catch mistakes before they affect customers.

steps.heading: Schedule price changes for upcoming sales
steps.body: Use scheduling features in your chosen app to automatically apply and revert price changes around planned sales or promotions.

faq.question: Can I bulk edit prices without installing an app?
faq.answer: Yes, Shopify's admin panel includes a built-in bulk editor for adjusting prices directly, though percentage-based automation typically requires a dedicated app.

faq.question: What's the difference between Bulk Price Editor, Easy by Bulk Editing, and Hextom?
faq.answer: These are different third-party apps that all offer percentage-based bulk pricing tools, so the right choice depends on which features and pricing tier fit your store best.

faq.question: Can I schedule a price increase to happen automatically after a sale ends?
faq.answer: Yes, scheduling features in bulk pricing apps let you set prices to change automatically for a sale and revert afterward without manual work.

faq.question: Is it safe to bulk edit prices on a live store?
faq.answer: It's safer to test the price changes first, since applying a percentage change to your entire catalog without checking it first can lead to pricing mistakes that affect sales.
